testcase.name: test_planner_generate

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drift_backend.py:314: in test_planner_generate assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_remix_trip

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drift_backend.py:348: in test_remix_trip assert r2.status_code == 200, r2.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
